queries.question: Show the CEO and board of directors of Customer A's bank.
queries.sql: select L.fullName, D.directorfullName  from Ceo L inner join banks B on B.ceoId = L.ceoId join  Board_of_directors D on B.boardID = D.boardID  inner join customers C on C.bankId = B.bankId where C.customerName = 'Customer A'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?directorfullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Ceo .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCeo ?l .
  ?d a :Board_of_directors .
  ?b p:hasBoard_of_directors ?d .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?l p:name ?fullname .
  ?d p:directorfullname ?directorfullname .
  ?c p:customerName ?customername_f .
  FILTER(STR(?customername_f) = "Customer A")
}

queries.question: Who are the CEO and the board of directors of the bank that had the largest withdrawal?
queries.sql: select L.fullName, D.directorfullName from Ceo L inner join banks B on B.ceoId = L.ceoId inner join customers C on C.bankId = B.bankId join  Board_of_directors D on B.boardID = D.boardID inner join Accounts A on A.customerId = C.CustomerId inner join Transactions T on T.accountId = A.accountId where T.type = 'Withdrawal' order by T.amount desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?directorfullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Ceo .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCeo ?l .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?d a :Board_of_directors .
  ?b p:hasBoard_of_directors ?d .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?t a :Transactions .
  ?t p:hasAccounts ?a .
  ?l p:name ?fullname .
  ?d p:directorfullname ?directorfullname .
  ?t p:type ?type_f .
  ?t p:amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Withdrawal")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?amount_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who heads the bank that Customer A banks with?
queries.sql: select L.fullName from Ceo L inner join banks B on B.ceoId = L.ceoId inner join customers C on C.bankId = B.bankId where C.customerName = 'Customer A'

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>

  ?l a :Ceo .
  ?b a :Banks .

  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?l p:name ?fullname .
  ?c p:customerName ?customername_f .
  FILTER(STR(?customername_f) = "Customer A")
}

queries.question: Who is the CEO of the bank that had the largest withdrawal?
queries.sql: select L.fullName from Ceo L inner join banks B on B.ceoId = L.ceoId inner join customers C on C.bankId = B.bankId inner join Accounts A on A.customerId = C.CustomerId inner join Transactions T on T.accountId = A.accountId where T.type = 'Withdrawal' order by T.amount desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Ceo .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCeo ?l .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?t a :Transactions .
  ?t p:hasAccounts ?a .
  ?l p:name ?fullname .
  ?t p:type ?type_f .
  ?t p:amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Withdrawal")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?amount_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who is on the board of directors of the bank that had the largest withdrawal?
queries.sql: select L.directorfullName from Board_of_directors L inner join banks B on B.boardID = L.boardID inner join customers C on C.bankId = B.bankId inner join Accounts A on A.customerId = C.CustomerId inner join Transactions T on T.accountId = A.accountId where T.type = 'Withdrawal' order by T.amount desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?directorfullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Board_of_directors .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasBoard_of_directors ?l .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?t a :Transactions .
  ?t p:hasAccounts ?a .
  ?l p:directorfullname ?directorfullname .
  ?t p:type ?type_f .
  ?t p:amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Withdrawal")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?amount_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who heads the bank that Customer A banks with?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?fullname ?directorfullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Ceo .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCeo ?l .
  ?d a :Board_of_directors .
  ?b p:hasBoard_of_directors ?d .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?l p:name ?fullname .
  ?d p:directorfullname ?directorfullname .
  ?c p:customerName ?customername_f .
  FILTER(STR(?customername_f) = "Customer A")
} }
  component: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Ceo .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCeo ?l .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?l p:name ?fullname .
  ?c p:customerName ?customername_f .
  FILTER(STR(?customername_f) = "Customer A")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?directorfullname WHERE {
  ?l a :Board_of_directors .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasBoard_of_directors ?l .
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?l p:directorfullname ?directorfullname .
  ?c p:customerName ?customername_f .
  FILTER(STR(?customername_f) = "Customer A")
} }
}
